## Discussion

A [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient/DeviceReference-swift.struct]with the same [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient/DeviceReference-swift.struct/deviceID] is an equivalent reference to the same device, and a [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient/DeviceReference-swift.struct/deviceID] for a device is equivalent across the system.

# deviceID

**Instance Property**

The unique ID for the associated HID device.

## Declaration

```swift
let deviceID: UInt64
```

## Discussion

A [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient/DeviceReference-swift.struct]with the same [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient/DeviceReference-swift.struct/deviceID] is an equivalent reference to the same device, and a [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient/DeviceReference-swift.struct/deviceID] for a device is equivalent across the system.
title: deviceID
